message: Implementation aligns with the final plan. Phase 1 (Steps 1-9) and Phase 2 (Steps 10-12) are fully implemented. Unit tests are passing.
Engine uses nonisolated pure functions and iterative rounding for `repetitionsThisPhase` to correctly match the spec's examples.
Schema updated with MemoryCard successfully. Additive fields are default-valued to ensure lightweight migration.
Test target EMOMORENEISATests correctly added using PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup.
